scenes._notes: Opening scene — Maeve looking for contact

messages_in.text: Is anyone receiving my messages?

choices.message: Yes, I got your message. Who are you?
Is this a joke? You're texting random numbers?

scenes._notes: Maeve responds based on choice 1 (requires_flag), then explains her situation

messages_in.text: Thank you for answering
Sorry
Kind of, yes… Sorry
I know this is strange but I need help and I have no one else to turn to
I just woke up in a room that looks like a hospital room, but it's not a hospital.
There was this phone on the floor with nothing but this messaging app and no contacts.
I've tried dozens of numbers but no messages go through except to this one apparently…
I know it sounds unbelievable but I really need help

choices.message: If this is a joke it's really not funny.

scenes._notes: Maeve's reaction based on player attitude — 3 conditional branches, then commitment choice

messages_in.text: I promise it's not!
Please, stay with me! I really need help!
Really?
Finally something good in this awful day!
Thank you thank you thank you
Yes, sorry… You're right…
It's not easy but I need to keep a clear head if I want to get out of here
Thank you! Having someone to share this with should help.

message: Hmm, I'm still not really convinced…
but I'm curious to see where this is going
Ok ok I don't know what to think but I'll stay…

choices.message: Ok. I'm staying with you. Tell me what you need.

scenes._notes: Maeve introduces herself — rename triggered on message, then exploration choice

messages_in.text: That's honest. I'll do the same.
For now that's already a lot. Thank you.
You can't know how good it feels to hear that.
My name is Maeve.
Well… I think so. My name is the only thing I'm really sure of right now.

scenes._notes: Maeve acknowledges the name via {nom_joueur} template, then exploration choice

messages_in.text: {nom_joueur}…
Ok {nom_joueur}. Right. We need to try to figure out what's going on.

choices.message: You don't remember anything other than your name?
Describe what you see around you.
Physically — are you in pain anywhere?

scenes._notes: First exploration — 3 conditional branches (memory / location / state), converging on battery constraint

messages_in.text: No. Not really.
I'm trying but it's blurry. Images, sounds. Nothing concrete.
You know that feeling of something on the tip of your tongue? Except it's your entire life.
White. Very white. Too white.
A bed, medical equipment but everything is off, unplugged. And this phone.
No window. And… I've been looking for a door this whole time.
Physically I'm more or less okay. My head is spinning a little.
What hurts the most is not understanding what brought me here.
Like I slept too long. Or not enough. I can't tell anymore.
I don't know how long this phone will last.
The battery is at 34%. And I don't know if it charges.
We need to figure out what's going on before I lose signal.
